text: Jarvis, quick check-in. What's on the calendar today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, May 10. No work meetings today. You have neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place and working on the garage cabinetry.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Hosted a game night at our place. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. I've mapped the locations. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Prepping school lunches for the week. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Healthy choices are great. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Checking on some house maintenance items. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Good planning. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that listening to a podcast in the garage. It was a really interesting history episode. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. I've adjusted the local settings. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Great progress. I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Having dinner with our friends tonight. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. I've mapped the locations. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Healthy choices are great. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, The kitchen sink area has a problem. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Automations are great when they work. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Screen time is always a negotiation. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. I've adjusted the local settings. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan's team played a match and won 2-1! Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Busy day for sports! What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I checked the telemetry feeds. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
